TestCase.name: testPattern1
TestCase.Resource: LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$0=[COUNT()], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$3]) LogicalFilter(condition=[SEARCH($2, Sarg[[21..40]])]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$0=[COUNT()], EXPR$0=[MIN($0)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$3]) LogicalFilter(condition=[SEARCH($2, Sarg[[1..20]])]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])

LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($1) FILTER $0], EXPR$0=[AVG($1) FILTER $2], EXPR$0=[COUNT() FILTER $0], EXPR$0=[COUNT() FILTER $2], EXPR$0=[MAX($1) FILTER $2], EXPR$0=[MIN($1) FILTER $0]) LogicalProject($f0=[SEARCH($2, Sarg[[1..20]])], SAL=[$3], $f2=[SEARCH($2, Sarg[[21..40]])]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
